title: SWISS JURA | Tête de Moine cheese PDO
description: A policy brief outlining recommendations to integrate, simplify, and align agricultural, food, and climate policies to enhance resilience and sustainability of the Tête de Moine PDO cheese value chain in the Swiss Jura region. It highlights the cheese’s economic contribution, challenges from climate change and market pressures, and suggests unified policy frameworks, sustainable innovation support, and streamlined administrative procedures.
